checks.name: ignored_build_scripts_classification
checks.detail: Fresh bootstrap tests and current `packages/bootstrap/src/install/index.ts` still prove that successful `pnpm install` runs with ignored build scripts are reclassified only after an explicit repo-local `pnpm exec tsx --eval ...` health check. Healthy toolchains remain warning-only; broken toolchains become `pnpm_install_failed` instead of false success.

checks.name: runtime_approve_builds_guidance
checks.detail: Fresh verifier commands returned `pnpm --version` -> `10.0.0`, `pnpm help approve-builds` -> `No results for "approve-builds"`, and the bootstrap runtime tests still prove that unsupported runtimes do not surface `pnpm approve-builds` guidance while supported runtimes do.

checks.name: bootstrap_shim_warning_normalization
checks.detail: Fresh bootstrap tests still cover PowerShell warning normalization, and an additional manual bash harness run against `scripts/install/install.sh` reproduced the ignored-build-scripts preflight warning, showed the normalized HappyTG explanation, suppressed the raw pnpm warning text, and confirmed the handoff through `pnpm --silent dlx tsx ...`.

checks.name: fresh_verification_commands
checks.detail: Fresh `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run test`, `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run typecheck`, `pnpm --filter @happytg/bootstrap run build`, workspace `pnpm test`, workspace `pnpm build`, and `pnpm happytg task validate --repo . --task HTG-2026-04-19-pnpm-build-script-warning-guard` all exited `0` on the current tree.
